peakaContainerRegistryAccessSecret.description: Credentials for pulling the Peaka container images. Provided by Peaka.

password.description: Registry access key provided by Peaka (JSON service-account key).

traefikTls.description: TLS termination by the built-in Traefik router. Leave disabled in the default setup and define TLS on the Ingress instead (ingress.tls). Enable only when the Traefik router is exposed directly, e.g. through a LoadBalancer service.

enabled.description: Enable only when the Traefik router is exposed directly and must terminate TLS itself.

secretName.description: To use a pre-created certificate secret instead of pasting cert/key: create it with `oc create secret tls peaka-traefik-tls --cert=fullchain.pem --key=key.pem` in the install namespace and set this field to peaka-traefik-tls. The secret must have exactly that name.

cert.description: PEM-encoded TLS certificate (full chain). Ignored when secretName is set.

key.description: PEM-encoded TLS private key matching the certificate. Ignored when secretName is set.

accessUrl.description: Public URL the Peaka application is reached at.

dbcDomain.description: Domain JDBC clients connect to, e.g. dbc.example.com. Defaults to accessUrl.domain when empty.

dbcPort.description: Port JDBC clients connect to: 443 when exposed through an ingress (default), 4567 when the Traefik router is exposed directly.

redhatRegistryAccessSecret.description: Optional registry.redhat.io credentials. Not needed on OpenShift; provide only on other clusters.

routing.description: How the built-in Traefik router receives its routing configuration.

provider.description: file (default): no CustomResourceDefinitions and no cluster-wide permissions are required. crd: uses Traefik custom resources and requires the Traefik CRDs to be installed on the cluster beforehand.

predefinedUsers.description: Optional list of users seeded at install time.

openAIApiKey.description: Optional OpenAI API key to enable AI-assisted features.

sampleDataAppId.description: Optional sample-data application id to seed demo data.

ingress.description: Exposes the Peaka web UI through the cluster's ingress. Enabled by default; the host is taken from accessUrl.domain.

tls.description: TLS certificate for the application domain. Required for HTTPS - without it the application is served over plain HTTP.

secretName.description: Name of a kubernetes.io/tls secret in the install namespace holding the certificate for the application domain. Create it with `oc create secret tls <name> --cert=fullchain.pem --key=key.pem`.

dbcIngress.description: Exposes the JDBC endpoint through the cluster's ingress. Requires accessUrl.dbcDomain: when dbcDomain is empty, no DBC Ingress is created and the JDBC endpoint is not exposed through the ingress.

tls.description: TLS certificate for the JDBC domain. Required for HTTPS on the JDBC endpoint.

secretName.description: Name of a kubernetes.io/tls secret in the install namespace holding the certificate for the JDBC domain.
